atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports concerns regarding recent bruising

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports decreasing her prednisone dose

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional extra prednisone doses due to foot pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports receiving a COVID vaccine

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant pain after receiving a COVID vaccine

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a second dose of the COVID vaccine a week later

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports new bruises appearing without apparent trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports inquiring about the cause of the bruises

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports prednisone may be contributing to increased bruising

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports methotrexate has helped with joint pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals good range of motion in the toes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals nails show ridges consistent with psoriasis

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is diagnosed with psoriatic arthritis
